items.title: Real OpenAI + Redis post generation
items.steps: Run /create with live API keys; generate a text post; confirm judge score and memory retrieval in Weave/Redis.

items.title: Weave score improvement demo
items.steps: Submit feedback on attempt 1, retry with lesson, confirm score improves in Weave traces.

items.title: Supabase profile image upload/display
items.steps: Upload profile photo in ProfileForm; confirm it appears on BrandProfileCard and feed preview.

items.title: End-to-end profile to preview
items.steps: Submit profile, generate post, continue to preview, approve, open /preview/[sessionId] feed mock.
